title: More Useful Copper
description: New uses for copper, such as statues, aquatic redstone, and many other tools!
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/More_Useful_Copper/BH_MUC_header.webp) **Update 3.0 NOW AVAILABLE!** When Minecraft added copper, the whole community had the same opinion, what is its real use? Unfortunately, copper has little use, very little use... That's why we have decided to give it much more use, adding copper variants to some of the default items, although with the goal of continuing to expand and add unique items. Among the new features added in version 3.0, we want to highlight the ability to use redstone underwater, with the new copper redstone, or the new statues! ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/More_Useful_Copper/BH_MUC_summary.webp) A fantastic addition for copper lovers! Don't you think copper should have many more uses? We think so too... and that's why we have created this mod, which will allow players to craft a lot of new useful items for their games. ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/More_Useful_Copper/BH_MUC_faq.webp) ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this mod be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/More_Useful_Copper/BH_MUC_screenshots.webp) ![Screenshots 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nKAkZnor/images/440554130480da93fe505d1399ba3c50878ce8da.jpeg) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
